rationale: Memory leak in mongo_connection_ismaster; C memory management bug, no spec rule violated.
getCollectionInfo returns collection name with database prefix; implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
getCollectionInfo should return numerically indexed array; API design consistency improvement, not a spec rule.
Remove fails when removing list of IDs with $in; implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
MongoClient inherits 500ms timeout from persistent connection; implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Documentation typo in createFromDocument examples; documentation fix, not a spec conformance issue.
Documentation error: MongoCommandCursor is a class not function; documentation fix, not a spec conformance issue.
Documentation missing version info for methods; documentation improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
MongoCursor::getNext returns null despite hasNext true; cursor iteration regression, no specific spec rule violated.
Incorrect string comparison (pointer vs char) in mongo_db_list_collections_legacy; C implementation bug, no spec rule.
hasNext/getNext cursor positioning changed in 1.6.1; cursor iteration regression, no specific spec rule violated.
hasNext stops one item too early when limit is present; cursor iteration bug, no spec rule violated.
MongoCollection::save with options array crashes Apache; C crash bug, no spec rule violated.
Unable to update field '0' using array; PHP-specific BSON/update bug with numeric keys, no spec rule violated.
SSL connection errors after replica set primary switch; implementation SSL reconnect bug, no spec rule violated.
Core dump on wrong DNS resolution for MongoDB servers; C crash bug in DNS handling, no spec rule violated.
Connection string parser doesn't support URL-encoded @ in password; connection-string spec requires URL-encoded special chars.
Handle private/protected properties with __sleep in BSON serialization; PHP-specific OOP serialization feature, no spec rule.
Constructors should throw exceptions on failure; PHP API behavioral improvement, marked BC break for major release.
Connection timeout on first write operation; implementation timing bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Wire protocol response flags (CursorNotFound) not handled; wire protocol spec says CursorNotFound should throw exception.
No IPv6 support in connection string parsing; connection-string spec requires IPv6 address support.
Bulk API doesn't work via PHP execute command; user misunderstanding/limitation of PHP execute command, not a spec issue.
Segfault in mongo_filter_candidates_by_credentials with null pointers; C null pointer crash, no spec rule violated.
Random SSL connection errors with replica set; SSL implementation reliability bug, no spec rule violated.
Connection hangs after some time requiring Apache restart; implementation stability bug, no spec rule violated.
Pin per-request connection to secondary; read preference pinning improvement, depends on DRIVERS-21, not a nonconformance bug.
Driver segfault on Debian ARM; platform-specific crash, no spec rule violated.
Intermittent DNS resolution failure errors; DNS reliability issue, no spec rule violated.
PHP scripts unresponsive after secondary failure; implementation availability bug, no spec rule violated.
GridFS: set custom _id for files; API feature addition, mentions Java driver implementation as reference.
Can't iterate twice over a cursor; implementation bug with cursor reset, no spec rule violated.
MongoException: type 0x72 not supported; BSON type handling bug for non-standard types, no spec rule cited.
Unable to rename collections via PHP; wrong authentication behavior when running against admin database, no spec rule violated.
Failed tests in 1.6.0 RC2; test infrastructure failures, not a spec conformance issue.
MongoClient not correctly initialized causing method call failure; implementation object initialization bug, no spec rule violated.
PHP Group function stops working with MongoDB 2.4.3; server compatibility regression, no spec rule violated.
MongoGridFSFile.getResource return type docblock uses 'stream' not 'resource'; PHP docblock fix, not a spec issue.
NativeLong on 64-bit serializes index keys as NumberLong causing incompatibility; PHP-specific BSON serialization regression.
Segfault in findAndModify test against MongoDB 3.0; C null pointer crash in legacy driver, no spec rule violated.
hasNext returns false for limit=1 result; cursor iteration regression from prior fix, no spec rule violated.
Segfault in findAndModify with nested subdocument; C crash bug, no spec rule violated.
Driver sends j=false, fsync=false in writeConcern for default writes; should not send these fields when using defaults per write-concern spec.
distinct command with empty query array rejected by MongoDB 3.0; server compatibility issue, not a spec violation.
Hostname matching with replica set doesn't work pre-PHP 5.6; PHP version-specific SSL limitation, not a spec conformance issue.
Add certificate expiration matching SSL option; new SSL feature addition, not a spec conformance issue.
SSL connections broken in PHP 5.6 due to PHP's redefinition of STREAM_CRYPTO_METHOD_SSLv23_CLIENT; PHP upstream bug.
Compile error when OpenSSL not available; build/compilation issue, not a spec conformance issue.
Test ticket with no description; trivial priority, no content, not relevant.
Driver segfaults with SSL and no context options; C memory management bug, no spec rule violated.
